LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT IDENTIFY THE PROPERTY SOUGHT TO BE ATTACHED. (CCP 484.020(E).) AT ITEM 9C, PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THE PROPERTY SUBJECT TO ATTACHMENT IS SPECIFIED IN AN ATTACHED SCHEDULE. NO SCHEDULE IS ATTACHED TO THE APPLICATION. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABILITY OF ITS CLAIM. (CCP 484.090(A)(2).) PLAINTIFF PROFFERS THE DECLARATION OF MICHAEL GESIMONDO IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION. IN HIS DECLARATION, MR. GESIMONDO REFERS TO EXHIBITS 1 - 5, WHICH ARE NOT INCLUDED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CITIBANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition was filed. Plaintiff shifted the burden to defendant by establishing each element of both causes of action. (See Undisputed Facts nos. 1-9.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey B. Kirschenbaum, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer, Tel. 415.227.3517, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A.'s Application For Right To Attach Order and Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff does not identify the property sought to be attached. (CCP 484.020(e).) At Item 9c, Plaintiff states that the Property subject to attachment is specified in an attached Schedule. No schedule is attached to the application. Plaintiff has not established the probability of its claim. (CCP 484.090(a)(2).) Plaintiff proffers the declaration of Michael Gesimondo in support of the application. In his declaration, Mr. Gesimondo refers to Exhibits 1 - 5, which are not included. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761
